shared_properties: Head, torso, forearms, and tail proportions match the idle base silhouette.
Core palette remains #535353 with transparent background cutout only.
Frame width and frame height stay 88x94px.
differences: Leg swing exaggerates forward and backward extension for the active running state.
Animation rate doubles to 12 FPS to match the main play cadence.
The chest leans forward by 2px to suggest forward momentum.

context.usage: Primary locomotion sheet used during the full running phase of live play.

shape.silhouette: The body volume mirrors the idle sheet while the hind leg silhouettes alternate between lead and trail poses.

face.eyes: One 4x4px eye cutout sits at x20-23 and y18-21 in each frame.
face.mouth: One 12px horizontal mouth slit sits below the eye line.

appendages.arms: Two short forearm clusters stay within a 10x8px chest block.
appendages.legs: Two hind legs use silhouette swaps that preserve the ground contact read.
appendages.tail: One thick tail extends 36px from the torso and rises 6px above the baseline at the tip.

specs.texture: Solid monochrome fill with transparent cutout background.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 176x94px with 2 columns and 1 row.
The silhouette width change between frames stays within 4px so the collider read remains stable.
The running loop reads cleanly at 12 FPS without any frame needing interpolation.
